memory.summary: The roommate's lingering odor and laundry pile are causing me distraction, but since they won't be home until 7 PM, I can leave for the library now to regain focus.
The library restores my focus by removing the odor, but moving locations leaves the root cause unaddressed, meaning my sleep debt will persist tonight.
I've made steady progress on the reading response, but my sleep debt remains unaddressed despite the improved focus at the library.
